Chemistry

Overview

Welcome to the Department of Chemistry, NIT Agartala. At present, the Chemistry Department runs 1-year Chemistry course for B.Tech, 2-years MSc and PhD programme in Chemistry. Besides, the Department offers 5-year BS-MS dual degree course in Chemistry since 2013, where the students are taking admissions through JEE-Mains. The department has 13  faculty members who are actively engaged in research including natural product chemistry, organic synthesis, organometallic chemistry, coordination chemistry, green chemistry, bioinorganic, nanotechnology, theoretical & computational chemistry. Our faculty also serve as journal editors, reviewers and are involved in outreach initiatives in the community. Our goal is to present the content of chemistry set in a current and relevant context for engineers. 

The course curriculum and syllabus of all the courses were prepared and modified with research-based knowledge and methods including designing the chemical reactions, synthesis, analysis as well as interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions following the NBA pattern with the help of Professors from IITs, IISc, NITs and other reputed institutions of our country. Our undergraduate program offers an innovative curriculum that provides students with variety of career paths including chemical industry, academia, medicine, education, government, as well as other fields. Our graduate program provides opportunities to students in a wide array of chemical disciplines including analytical, biological, environmental, inorganic, organic, materials, physical, and theoretical chemistry. Graduate students have the freedom to personalize their courses and research projects.

The Department has got sponsored projects of around 2.5  crores from various funding agencies viz., AICTE, DST, CSIR, DAE-BRNS, Mumbai, CPRI Bangalore, etc. During the last five years, a large number of postgraduate students have qualified NET and GATE examinations. The Department has published around more than 100 research articles in reputed international journals along with many book chapters under the publishers such as ACS, RSC, Elsevier, Springer, Wiley, Taylor Francis, etc in the last five years. The Department has smart classrooms, conference room, well-equipped B.Tech laboratories, special laboratories for Physical, Inorganic and Organic chemistry courses, research laboratory, theoretical modelling laboratory as well as Instrumentation laboratory with high-end instruments for quality research works.

Latest News

  • Departmental Invited talk at on "Technological Aspects in Photoreactors: Light-Driven Chemical Transformation" by Dr. Subrata Das, Associate Professor in the Department of Chemical Science and Technology at NIT Patna on 23-03-2026

  • Departmental Invited talk on "Rice Bran Oil Technology and ﻿How IICT Contributed to Bring a Paradigm Shift in Indian Industry" by Dr. Pradosh P. Chakra﻿barti, Principal Scientist at CSIR–IICT Hyderabad on 09-01-2026

  • Departmental Invited talk on "Engineered Smart Fluorescent Photophysical Systems for Targeted Analyte Sensing" by Prof. Pabitra Chattopadhyay, Department of Chemistry, The University of Burdwan on 07-01-2026

  • The Department of Chemistry, NIT Agartala is going to organize a Seven-day Training Programme on "Advances in Chemical Sciences" from 18-24 Jan, 2023.
    Registration Link

Vision

i. The Department of Chemistry strives to contribute to a chemically literate society through teaching (with classrooms, labs, and research), scholarship, and service. 

ii. Lead in fostering solutions to problems of global significance by collaborating across many disciplines both within and external to the Department.

Mission

i. Provide a conducive environment for teaching and learning activities in all areas of Chemistry and modern topics in multidisciplinary/ interdisciplinary areas.


ii. Develop industry-institute interaction by mutually developing industry oriented projects for the benefit of Society.
